title: MobHealthHologram
description: MobHealthHologram is a Spigot/Paper plugin that displays customizable health holograms above entities, providing players with instant visual feedback on mob health. It is fully configurable, allowing you to customize the view distance, health bar format,
body:
MobHealthHologram is an essential Spigot/Paper plugin designed to enhance your Minecraft gameplay by providing clear, customizable health information for hostile and passive mobs. Say goodbye to guessing mob health – with MobHealthHologram, you'll see dynamic, floating health bars and names above any entity you look at, giving you a tactical advantage in combat and better awareness in your world.
Key Features:
Dynamic Health Holograms: Instantly see the health of any mob you're looking at, displayed as a floating hologram above their head.

Fully Customizable: Take complete control over the plugin's appearance and behavior through a comprehensive config.yml file:

Health Bar Customization: Adjust the length, choose your preferred symbols, and set distinct colors for filled and empty health segments.

Text Formatting: Define how mob names and health values are displayed, including decimal precision and color codes.

View Distance: Optimize performance by setting the maximum distance at which holograms are rendered.

Entity Whitelist: Precisely control which mob types will display holograms, from common zombies to powerful Ender Dragons.

Custom Entity Names: Override default mob names with your own custom display names for a personalized experience.

Performance Optimized: Designed with efficiency in mind, featuring configurable update cooldowns and intelligent tracking to minimize server load.

In-Game Management: Use simple commands (/mobhealth reload, /mobhealth toggle) to manage the plugin without needing to restart your server.

Broad Compatibility: Works seamlessly with Spigot and Paper servers running Minecraft 1.18 and above, including the latest versions like 1.21.1.

Whether you're a seasoned warrior needing precise health data or just want a clearer view of your farm animals, MobHealthHologram offers a sleek, configurable solution to bring vital information directly into your line of sight.
